toilets.title: Nearby toilets
toilets.privacy: Your location is only used to query OpenStreetMap, anonymously. Nothing is stored or tracked.
toilets.denied: Location denied. Enable it to see nearby toilets — the emergency card stays available above.
toilets.offline: Could not reach the service. Check your connection.
